untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-asset class monitoring (2+ major asset classes at all-time highs), mainstream media sentiment analysis (5+ stories/month threshold), market breadth divergence tracking (small cap vs large cap), and regime identification across multiple instruments. The backtest engine operates on single-instrument OHLCV data and does not support cross-asset correlation analysis, media narrative quantification, or breadth indicators. Partial proxy implemented: low volatility percentile (hvol_20 < 0.40) and price near highs (price_pos_20 > 0.95) as substitute for all-time high + low vol regime conditions. Exit on 50-day MA breach substitutes for downtrend detection.
translation_notes: This is a macro regime-shift warning signal that fundamentally requires multi-asset, multi-factor analysis beyond single-instrument technical analysis. hvol_20 < 0.40 approximates bottom 40% volatility percentile. price_pos_20 > 0.95 approximates proximity to all-time highs. Media narrative, breadth divergence, and cross-asset correlation cannot be expressed with allowed indicators. The signal's intent is defensive positioning during bubble conditions, not traditional directional trading. Recommendation: implement as separate pre-trade regime filter outside backtest engine.
